CVE-2021-3933.title: An integer overflow could occur when OpenEXR processes a crafted  ...
CVE-2021-3933.summary: An integer overflow could occur when OpenEXR processes a crafted file on systems where size_t < 64 bits. This could cause an invalid bytesPerLine and maxBytesPerLine value, which could lead to problems with application stability or lead to other attack paths.
